creator: vsityz@gmail.com
text:
There is a problem.
After detach USB Flash drive a keyboard does not work.

in /var/lod/messages

May 30 17:05:37 scorpion kernel: ugen1.2: <Generic> at usbus1
May 30 17:05:37 scorpion kernel: umass0: <Generic USB2.0-CRW, class 0/0, rev 2.00/19.81, addr 2> on usbus1

In console and in Xorg keyboard not work.
